issues.summary: MV-LDR-105 CAT 966F S/N 7HK02184 - Decommission prep service, hr-meter 11,840
issues.description: Ran decommission-prep service per MV-PROC-DECOMM-v2013 on wheel loader MV-LDR-105 (CAT 966F, S/N 7HK02184). Hr-meter read at start of shift: 11,840. Fluids drained, ECM data pulled, hydraulic pressures logged, DOT plates removed. Unit staged for cold storage pending disposal decision. Confluence legacy shop-log shows a later entry at 12,103 hr from 2021 that I cannot corroborate against any work order, timesheet, or parts pull. Flagging for Sophia's retrospective review.

comments.author: Daniel Ruiz
comments.body: Closed at 15:22. Cold-storage tag applied. Sophia should verify the parts count when she does the retrospective.
